files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles based on the contents listing. The first is the main article about adolescent development, and the second is an announcement about the Eliza R. Snow Memorial Poem contest with rules and submission guidelines.

splits.title: Guide Lessons for October
splits.start_boundary: Guide Lessons for October LESSON I Theology and

files.notes: This file contains two main sections: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman (which includes Salt Lake Stake activities and various mission reorganizations) and 'Guide Lessons for October' (which contains multiple lessons including Theology, Work and Business, and Literature sections with biographical material on Bertha A. Kleinman and Grace Ingles Frost). The Guide Lessons section is quite extensive and contains multiple sub-lessons but should be kept together as one cohesive instructional unit.

splits.title: Guide Lessons for October
splits.start_boundary: GUIDE LESSONS FOR OCTOBER 451 For trees have

files.notes: This file contains a single comprehensive Guide Lessons article for October with multiple lessons (I-IV) covering Theology, Work and Business, Literature (featuring poets Bertha A. Kleinman and Grace Ingles Frost), and Social Service (Child-Study Course). The file also includes advertisements at the end. All content appears to be part of one unified Guide Lessons section rather than separate articles.
